gt_sql: SELECT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.SM NOT IN ('negative','0') ORDER BY T1.Birthday DESC LIMIT 3
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.SM NOT IN ('negative', '0')
ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 3
question: For the patients with an abnormal anti-SM, please list the IDs of the three youngest ones.
